channel.title: Interactive on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Interactive on Tech Tracker

item.title: Interactive - The only best home launcher I liked powered by AI.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-Ys_LbUH0URg/Ym1t4M3QYDI/AAAAAAAAKiY/1OVqgWtfFk02QdF639cdMMEBgqxuNzmSwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1651338716729358-0.png" alt=""> Smartphones, usually come with home launcher by using that you can find your apps and remove or uninstall them easily, however most system home launchers are not packed with custom features so due to that people who want extra customization installing third party home launchers. We have many third party home launchers available for Android with alot of features but the primary reason why people install third party home launchers is because of support for custom icon packs yet to be honest none of them really impressed me even Lawnchair and Nova launcher etc.
